title: Pork and Lemongrass Meatballs
description: Moreish pork and lemongrass meatballs served with a sweet chilli cucumber sauce, perfect with rice and seasonal vegetables.
context: If you prefer, use chicken or turkey mince instead of pork to make these moreish meatballs.
steps: Preheat oven to 200°C (180°C fan) mark 6. Line a large baking tray with baking parchment.
Put spring onions, garlic, lemongrass, coriander, soy sauce and some seasoning into a food processor. Whizz until finely chopped, then add pork mince and whizz again to combine.
Shape mixture into about 24 walnut-size balls and arrange on the lined tray. Cook for 15–18 minutes until golden and cooked through; any juices can be poured over the meatballs when you serve.

Meanwhile, put the sugar, rice vinegar, chilli and 3 tbsp water into a small pan. Heat gently to dissolve the sugar, then turn up the heat and bubble for 1 minute. Take off the heat and stir in the cucumber and sesame oil.
Empty the sauce into a small serving bowl. Serve meatballs with the sauce, boiled rice and seasonal vegetables.
